name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES proc, state



TypeOK == /\ proc \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [proc \in proc |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ proc = 1..N
        /\ state = [proc \in proc |-> idle]

Next == \/ \E i \in proc:
            /\ state[i] = trying
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = @ = critical]
        \/ \E i \in proc:
            /\ state[i] = critical
            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = @ = idle]
        \/ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ proc \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [proc \in proc |-> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ Len(Subset(proc, \lambda i : state[i] = critical)) <= 1

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, messages



coordinator == [id |-> 0]
participants == [i \in 1..N |-> [id |-> i]]
state == [p \in Participants |-> "INIT"]
votes == [p \in Participants |-> "NONE"]
messages == <<>>

Prepare == [msg |-> [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> 0, to |-> 1..N]]
VoteYes == [msg |-> [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> 1..N, to |-> 0]]
VoteNo == [msg |-> [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> 1..N, to |-> 0]]
Commit == [msg |-> [type |-> "Commit", from |-> 0, to |-> 1..N]]
Abort == [msg |-> [type |-> "Abort", from |-> 0, to |-> 1..N]]

Init == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "INIT"]
        /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "NONE"]
        /\ messages = <<Prepare>>

PreparePhase == /\ messages = <<Prepare>>
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "PREPARED" |-> p \in Participants]
                /\ messages' = <<>> (* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)

VotePhase == /\ messages = <<VoteYes>> \/ <<VoteNo>>
                /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "YES" |-> p \in Participants]
                /\ messages' = <<Commit>> \/ <<Abort>>

CommitPhase == /\ messages = <<Commit>>
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "COMMITTED" |-> p \in Participants]
                /\ messages' = <<>>

AbortPhase == /\ messages = <<Abort>>
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "ABORTED" |-> p \in Participants]
                /\ messages' = <<>>

Next == \/ PreparePhase
        \/ VotePhase
        \/ CommitPhase
        \/ AbortPhase

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>>
(* --------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

TypeOK == /\ state \in [Participants -> {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}]
          /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"NONE", "YES", "NO"}]
          /\ messages \in Seq({"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"})

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a set of indices of philosophers who currently hold them *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = {}
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper to check if a philosopher can eat (both forks are free) *)
CanEat(i) == 
  /\ i \notin forks
  /\ (i % N) + 1 \notin forks

(* Transition for philosopher i to start eating *)
Eat(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = forks \cup {i, (i % N) + 1}
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Transition for philosopher i to finish eating *)
Finish(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = forks \ {i, (i % N) + 1}
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Transition for philosopher i to become hungry *)
Hungry(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N:
    \/ Eat(i)
    \/ Finish(i)
    \/ Hungry(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* --algorithm BoundedFIFOQueue --
variables q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0], head = 1, tail = 1, size = 0

      var x = input()


      output(q[head])



*)

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]

Init == /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ size < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = input()]
       \/ /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = output()]
       \/ /\ size = K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ size' = size
           /\ q' = q
       \/ /\ size = 0
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ size' = size
           /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<head, tail, size, q>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor \cup {s}
        \/ \E s \in Server :
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels
VARIABLES channelState, localState, markerReceived, markerSent, snapshotCompleted, snapshotInitiated, snapshotInitiator, state


(* --algorithm ChandyLamportSnapshot *)
                      /\ state[i] = "initial"
                      /\ snapshotInitiated' = TRUE
                      /\ snapshotInitiator' = i
                      /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
                      /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotCompleted>>

  RecordState(i) == /\ state[i] = "recording"
                   /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = 2]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotInitiator, snapshotInitiated, snapshotCompleted>>

  SendMarker(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "recording"
                     /\ markerSent[(i, j)] = FALSE
                     /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![(i, j)] = TRUE]
                     /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerReceived, snapshotInitiator, snapshotInitiated, snapshotCompleted>>

  ReceiveMarker(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "recording"
                        /\ markerReceived[(i, j)] = FALSE
                        /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![(i, j)] = TRUE]
                        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recorded"]
                        /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, channelState, markerSent, snapshotInitiator, snapshotInitiated, snapshotCompleted>>

  ReceiveMessage(i, j, m) == /\ state[i] = "recording"
                           /\ markerSent[(i, j)] = TRUE
                           /\ markerReceived[(i, j)] = TRUE
                           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![(i, j)] = Append(channelState[(i, j)], m)]
                           /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotInitiator, snapshotInitiated, snapshotCompleted>>

  CheckCompletion == /\ snapshotInitiated = TRUE
                    /\ snapshotCompleted' = TRUE
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotInitiator, snapshotInitiated>>

  Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: InitiateSnapshot(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: RecordState(i)
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: SendMarker(i, j)
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: ReceiveMarker(i, j)
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N, m \in Nat: ReceiveMessage(i, j, m)
        \/ CheckCompletion
---- algorithm ends ---

        /\ localState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
        /\ snapshotInitiated = FALSE
        /\ snapshotCompleted = FALSE

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N: InitiateSnapshot(i)
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: RecordState(i)
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: SendMarker(i, j)
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: ReceiveMarker(i, j)
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N, m \in Nat: ReceiveMessage(i, j, m)
        \/ CheckCompletion

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotInitiator, snapshotInitiated, snapshotCompleted>> /\ <> snapshotCompleted

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Channel
VARIABLES channel, chunks, retransmits, seqNum

    /\ seqNum \in 0..Len(File) \* Sequence number is within bounds
    /\ chunks \subseteq 1..Len(File) \* Chunks are valid sequence numbers
    /\ retransmits \in [1..Len(File) -> 0..MaxRetries] \* Retransmit counts are valid
    /\ channel \subseteq Channel \* Channel contains only valid messages

Init ==
    /\ seqNum = 0
    /\ chunks = 1..Len(File)
    /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Len(File) |-> 0]
    /\ channel = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ seqNum \in chunks
    /\ channel' = channel \cup {(File[seqNum], seqNum, "data")}
    /\ seqNum' = seqNum + 1
    /\ chunks' = chunks \ {seqNum}
    /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![seqNum] = 0]

Retransmit ==
    /\ seqNum \notin chunks
    /\ retransmits[seqNum] < MaxRetries
    /\ channel' = channel \cup {(File[seqNum], seqNum, "data")}
    /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![seqNum] = retransmits[seqNum] + 1]

Drop ==
    /\ channel' = channel \ {CHOOSE m \in channel: m[2] = "data"}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<seqNum, chunks, retransmits>>

Ack ==
    /\ channel' = channel \ {CHOOSE m \in channel: m[2] = "ack"}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<seqNum, chunks, retransmits>>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ Drop
    \/ Ack

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<seqNum, chunks, retransmits, channel>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES data, txns, nextTxId


  txns = <<>>;   (* sequence of transaction states *)
  nextTxId = 0;  (* next transaction ID *)

TxRead(0, 0)  (* Read record 0 in transaction 0 *)
TxWrite(0, 0, 42)  (* Write 42 to record 0 in transaction 0 *)
Commit(0)  (* Commit transaction 0 *)
----

(* State space *)
State == [data: Seq(Nat), txns: Seq(TxState), nextTxId: Nat]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ data = <<>>
        /\ txns = <<>>
        /\ nextTxId = 0

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ Begin
           /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, nextTxId>>
         \/ /\ TxRead(txId, recId)
             /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, nextTxId>>
         \/ /\ TxWrite(txId, recId, val)
             /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, nextTxId>>
         \/ /\ Commit(txId)
             /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, nextTxId>>
         \/ /\ Abort(txId)
             /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, nextTxId>>

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, txns, nextTxId>>

(* Invariant: All committed transactions have consistent snapshots *)
TypeOK == /\ data \in Seq(Nat)
           /\ txns \in Seq(TxState)
           /\ nextTxId \in Nat
           /\ \A tx \in txns : tx.status \in {"active", "committed", "aborted"}
           /\ \A tx \in txns : tx.readSet \in Seq(Nat)
           /\ \A tx \in txns : tx.writeSet \in Seq(Nat)
           /\ \A tx \in txns : tx.writeVals \in Seq(Nat)

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: Abs(clocks[i]) <= epsilon

Next == /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = (clocks[i] + Sum(j \in 1..N, clocks[j])) \div N
                    FORALL i \in 1..N]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: Abs(clocks'[i]) <= epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_clocks

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in {P1, P2} |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = P1

Next == \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn = P2
          /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn = P1
          /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
          /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn = P1
          /\ turn = P2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, T

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup {j \in 1..N : infected[j]}]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => known'[j] = known[j] /\ infected'[j] = infected[j]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

TypeOK == /\ known \in [1..N -> SUBSET 1..N]
          /\ infected \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Allocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == 
  /\ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in free :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in allocated[c] :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
        /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ free' = free
      /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients : c1 /= c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC
CONSTANTS FiniteSequences

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId



TypeOK == 
  /\ subscribers \in FiniteSequences(Subscriber)
  /\ messages \in FiniteSequences(Publisher)

Init == 
  /\ subscribers = << >>
  /\ messages = << >>
  /\ nextMsgId = 0

Next == 
  /\ subscribers' = Append(subscribers, << >>)
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, << >>)
  /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1

Spec == 
  Init /\ [][Next]_<< subscribers, messages, nextMsgId >>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E delta \in Nat :
       /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![n] = counts[n][n] + delta]]
       /\ \A m \in Node : m # n => counts'[m] = counts[m]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Int]]
         /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Int
